hero.subtitle: Wholesale - Retail - Custom Orders
hero.description: For 40 years, MM Enterprises has been the first name schools across Mysore and Karnataka call for quality school belts, uniform socks, sports medals, designer labels, and ties - delivered on time, every time.

products.titleHtml:
Everything Your School
Needs, In One Place
products.subtitle: Quality-tested products, available in bulk. Custom school branding and printing available on all items.

items.name: School Uniform Belts
items.description: Durable nylon and polyester belts with brass or plastic buckles. Available in all sizes from Class 1 to Class 12. Custom school name printing available.

items.name: Uniform Socks
items.description: Cotton-blend school socks in white, grey, navy and all school colours. Breathable, anti-odour, and durable enough for daily school wear.

items.name: Sports Medals & Awards
items.description: Gold, silver and bronze medals for sports days, annual functions and competitions. Custom engraving with school name and event details available.

items.name: Designer Labels & Badges
items.description: Woven name labels, cloth badges, embroidered emblems. School logo printing on labels - ideal for uniforms, bags, books and stationery.

items.name: Industrial Uniforms
items.description: Durable industrial uniforms and safety gear including coveralls, jackets, reflective vests, and workwear designed for factories, construction sites, and technical staff. Built for comfort, safety, and long-lasting performance.

items.name: Custom Requirement?
items.description: We fulfil custom uniform accessory orders for schools of any size. Tell us what you need and we'll provide a competitive bulk quote.

items.title: 40 Years of Trust
items.text: Established in 1985, we have served schools, colleges, retailers, and industrial teams across Karnataka for four decades.

items.title: Quality Guaranteed
items.text: Every item is quality-checked before dispatch. Durable materials, neat stitching, and color fastness - we stand behind everything we supply.

items.title: Bulk Order Experts
items.text: Whether you need 50 pieces or 5,000 - we handle bulk orders efficiently with competitive pricing that scales with your order size.

items.title: On-Time Delivery
items.text: We understand tight timelines and event schedules. Reliable delivery across Karnataka keeps your orders on time, every time.

about.title: Four Decades of Serving Karnataka's Schools
text: Founded in 1985 by Mr. M. Malick, MM Enterprises started as a humble supplier of school accessories in Mysore. What began as a small operation has grown into one of Karnataka's most trusted names in school uniform accessories.

Today, from our store on Abdul Rahman Road, Udaygiri, Mysore, we serve hundreds of schools across the region - supplying everything from belts and socks to medals and custom labels - with the same commitment to quality and service that built our reputation over four decades.
bullets: Wholesale and retail - small and large orders both welcome
Custom branding - school name, logo and emblem printing
4.9* rated on Justdial - Trusted by 500+ Karnataka schools

clients.titleHtml:
Trusted Supplier for Every
Type of Institution
clients.subtitle: From small primary schools to large colleges - we have the capacity and product range to serve institutions of every size.

items.quote: We have been buying school belts and socks from MM Enterprises for over 12 years. Never once had a quality complaint from parents. Always on time before the new academic year.
items.name: S. Kumar

items.quote: The custom-engraved medals for our annual sports day were absolutely beautiful. The children were so proud to receive them. MM Enterprises delivered 200 medals in just 4 days.
items.name: Rekha Nagaraj

items.quote: Best wholesale supplier in Mysore for school accessories. Competitive prices, no compromise on quality, and Mr. Malick personally ensures every order is right. Highly recommended.
items.name: Abdul Rasheed
items.role: Owner - New Star Uniform Store, Mysore

seo.paragraph: MM Enterprises Mysore supplies school uniform accessories, school belts, uniform socks, sports medals, trophies, badges, designer labels, and custom school branding. Looking for labeling in Mysore or buy medals in Mysore? We provide medal engraving, annual day medals, sports day awards, uniform badges, logo printing, school ties, bulk orders, and wholesale uniform accessories across Mysore and Karnataka.
